name: matia-seo
description: Matia — SEO/GEO Agent Platform. The visibility watch for Next.js sites.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @matia/core && npm run build -w @matia/integrations-google && npm run build -w @matia/next && npm run build -w @matia/cli
scripts.build:all: npm run build && npm run build -w @matia/cockpit
